name: velocity-throw-snap
title: Velocity Throw Snap
description: A five-shot rail whips past on a fast decaying curve, then overshoots and snaps the selected hero shot exactly to center.
evidence: Video Primitives Wave H U29 velocity-throw-snap contract

variables.label: Hero index
variables.description: Zero-based index of the shot centered at the settle.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Highlight color used by the hero shot.

variables.label: Card label prefix
variables.description: Text placed before each shot number.
